![Manure module icon](../resources/images/man_icon.png){width=25%}
# Manure Module
<!-- reuse code to import functions from "../scripts/": -->
{{< include ../scripts/_import-from-scripts.qmd >}}

## Introduction





## Manure Handler

### Introduction 

### Methodology

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update





## Solid Liquid Separators

### Introduction

### Methodology

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update


## Anaerobic Digestion

### Introduction

### Methodology

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update





## Slurry Storage

### Introduction

### Methodology

### Received, stored, and emptied outputs

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update





## Anaerobic Lagoon

### Introduction

### Methodology

### Received, stored, and emptied outputs

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update





## Bedded Pack

### Introduction

### Methodology

### Received, stored, and emptied outputs

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update



## Open Lot

### Introduction

### Methodology

### Received, stored, and emptied outputs

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update



## Composting

### Introduction

### Methodology

### Received, stored, and emptied outputs

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs

### Manure Composition Update



## Daily Spread

### Introduction




## Key constants

## References
